title: callicarpa integerrima
intro: Callicarpa integerrima, also known as the purple coral plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Callicarpa integerrima include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. In herbal preparations, Callicarpa integerrima is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its leaves and flowers can be dried and used as a herbal supplement.
